def: A number that names part of a whole or part of a group.
example: If you eat 1 out of 4 slices, you ate 1/4 of the pizza.

def: To split an amount into equal groups, or to find how many equal pieces fit.
Groups that each have the same amount in them.
example: 8 apples in 4 baskets means 2 apples in each basket.

def: One complete thing or one full amount before you cut it up.
example: One whole sandwich cut in half gives you two halves.

def: Asking how many small pieces go into a larger amount.
example: How many 1/2 cups fit in 2 cups? 4 fit.
